name: Comment
description: Comment schema from Censys Platform API

asset_id.description: The identifier of the commented asset (host IP, certificate SHA-256 fingerprint, or web property domain/IP:port).

asset_type.description: The inferred type of the asset.

created_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the comment was created.

created_by.description: The user ID of the user who created the comment.

id.description: The unique ID of the comment.

platform_ref.description: A direct URL to the asset in the Censys platform.

updated_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the comment was last updated.
